zh.lifeSummary: 當William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf於1349年10月21日出生在英國諾福爾可喬加時，他的父親Sir John Bardolph , 3rd Lord Bardolph35歲，母親Elizabeth d'Amory31歲。他於1366年2月10日之後與Agnes Poynings在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1386年1月29日在英國諾福爾可金也斯 琳享年36歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可金也斯 琳 聖 約翰。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf于1349年10月21日出生在英国諾福爾可喬加时，他的父亲Sir John Bardolph , 3rd Lord Bardolph35岁，母亲Elizabeth d'Amory31岁。他于1366年2月10日之后与Agnes Poynings在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1386年1月29日在英国諾福爾可金也斯 琳享年36岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可金也斯 琳 聖 約翰。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf was born on 21 October 1349, in Wormegay, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir John Bardolph , 3rd Lord Bardolph, was 35 and his mother, Elizabeth d'Amory, was 31. He married Agnes Poynings after 10 February 1366, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 29 January 1386, in King's Lynn, Norfolk, England, at the age of 36, and was buried in King's Lynn St John, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf est né le 21 octobre 1349, à Wormegay, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Bardolph , 3rd Lord Bardolph, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth d'Amory, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Poynings après 10 février 1366, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 29 janvier 1386, à King's Lynn, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à King's Lynn St John, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf am 21. Oktober 1349 in Wormegay, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Bardolph , 3rd Lord Bardolph 35 und seine Mutter Elizabeth d'Amory 31. Er hat nach 10. Februar 1366 in England Agnes Poynings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 29. Januar 1386 im Alter von 36 Jahren in King's Lynn, Norfolk, England und wurde in King's Lynn St John, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf è nato il il 21 ottobre 1349 nel Wormegay, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir John Bardolph , 3rd Lord Bardolph, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth d'Amory, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Poynings dopo il 10 febbraio 1366, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 29 gennaio 1386, nel King's Lynn, Norfolk, England, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a King's Lynn St John, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolfが1349年10月21日にイギリスノーフォルクウオルメガイで生まれた時，父Sir John Bardolph , 3rd Lord Bardolphは35歳，母Elizabeth d'Amoryは31歳であった。1366年2月10日以後にイギリスでAgnes Poyningsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1386年1月29日にイギリスノーフォルクキング'ス リンで36歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクキング'ス リン スト ジョンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf(이)가 1349년 10월 21일 영국 노르폴크 워메가이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Bardolph , 3rd Lord Bardolph(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth d'Amory(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1366년 2월 10일 이후 영국에서 Agnes Poynings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1386년 1월 29일 영국 노르폴크 킨그'스 린에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 킨그'스 린 스트 존에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf nasceu em 21 de outubro de 1349, em Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Bardolph , 3rd Lord Bardolph, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth d'Amory, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Poynings após 10 de fevereiro de 1366, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de janeiro de 1386, em King's Lynn, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em King's Lynn St John, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf родился 21 октября 1349 г. в местности вормегеи, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Bardolph , 3rd Lord Bardolph было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth d'Amory, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Poynings после 10 февраль 1366 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 29 января 1386 г. в местности кинг'с линн, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности кинг'с линн ст джон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf nació el 21 de octubre de 1349, en Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Bardolph , 3rd Lord Bardolph, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Elizabeth d'Amory, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Agnes Poynings después de 10 de febrero de 1366, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 29 de enero de 1386, en King's Lynn, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en King's Lynn St John, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
